positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a whimsical celestial creature—a dream-woven fox with iridescent fur and luminous glowing tails. It is leaping through a starry, nebulous forest, leaving behind trails of glowing constellations and ethereal dust. The style is Neo-Art Nouveau and intricate woodcut etching combined with bioluminescent watercolor washes. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, sapphire blue, glowing cyan, and metallic gold accents. The composition is highly symmetrical and centered, designed to be a clean, striking silhouette against a contrasting background, ensuring optimal visibility when printed on fabric. Flat vector elements should complement the detailed rendering, emphasizing clean lines and strong graphic contrast. High contrast, elegant, dreamlike, mystical, intricate linework.
negative: blurry, jpeg artifacts, watermark, text, signature, logo, noisy, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, cropped, low detail, messy, sketch, photo-realistic, gradient skin, bokeh, muted colors
